title: Angular
excerpt: description: Deploy an Angular application to Cloudflare Pages. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/pages/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. [Angular ↗](https://angular.io/) is an incredibly popular framework for building reactive and powerful front-end applications. In this guide, you will create a new Angular application and deploy it using Cloudflare Pages.
